name: video-studio
description: Create long-form Video Studio videos with Jogg talking-avatar opening and closing shots.

interface.shortDescription: Produce Jogg-powered Video Studio videos locally.
interface.longDescription: Orchestrates local Jogg and Podcastor Video Studio services to create a planned, storyboarded, B-roll-led video with Jogg avatar scenes.
defaultPrompt: Use Video Studio to create a 10 minute Chinese video with Jogg avatars only at the opening and closing.
Use Video Studio to check the status of my video run.
Use Video Studio to resume my incomplete video render.
